'''Harpori''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located in the [[Druess sector/Legends|Druess sector]] near the [[Balowa system/Legends|Balowa system]] within the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It hosted a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] colony that was wiped out by [[Kaox Krul]] in [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]], shortly before the [[Ruusan campaign|Battles of Ruusan]].
